title: AI 课程资源
lead: 按「入门 → 机器学习 → 深度学习 → LLM 大模型 → AI Agent → AI 工程实践」编排的免费课程；必收录微软 / 吴恩达 / 斯坦福 / Google 核心课，并补充近半年新课。
source_note: 必收录不受时间窗限制；补充课来自 DeepLearning.AI / Coursera 免费课 / Hugging Face Learn / YouTube 公开视频课。

items.title: Generative AI for Beginners（微软官方 AI 入门）
items.summary: 微软官方 Generative AI 入门课，覆盖提示词、RAG、Agent 等基础实践。

items.title: Command Line Basics for Beginners - Full Course
items.summary: freeCodeCamp.org · YouTube 免费完整课程向视频

items.title: Google Machine Learning Crash Course
items.summary: Google 官方机器学习速成课，从基础概念到实践练习。

items.title: Machine Learning（吴恩达 · DeepLearning.AI）
items.summary: 吴恩达经典机器学习入门课，建立监督学习与模型评估基础。

items.title: Deep RL Course
items.summary: Hugging Face Learn 免费开源课程 · deep-rl-course

items.title: CS231n Deep Learning for Computer Vision（斯坦福）
items.summary: 斯坦福计算机视觉深度学习神课，CNN 与视觉表征经典路线。

items.title: Deep Learning Specialization（吴恩达 · DeepLearning.AI）
items.summary: 吴恩达深度学习专项：神经网络、CNN、序列模型与项目实践。

items.title: Audio Course
items.summary: Hugging Face Learn 免费开源课程 · audio-course

items.title: Computer Vision Course
items.summary: Hugging Face Learn 免费开源课程 · computer-vision-course

items.title: Diffusion Course
items.summary: Hugging Face Learn 免费开源课程 · diffusion-course

items.title: CS224n NLP with Deep Learning（斯坦福）
items.summary: 斯坦福 NLP / 深度学习公开课，Transformer 与语言模型基础。

items.title: CS336 Language Modeling from Scratch（斯坦福）
items.summary: 斯坦福从零构建语言模型课程，覆盖数据、架构、训练与推理。

items.title: DeepLearning.AI 短课程系列（吴恩达团队）
items.summary: DeepLearning.AI 持续更新的免费短课程合集，覆盖 RAG、Agent、推理优化等。

items.title: Build and Train an LLM with JAX
items.summary: Build and train a 20M-parameter LLM from scratch using JAX, the open-source library behind Google's Gemini, and learn the core techniques powering modern AI development.

items.title: Building Multimodal Data Pipelines
items.summary: Learn to build AI-powered pipelines that turn images, audio, and video into LLM-ready text, and power multimodal applications on top.

items.title: AI Prompting for Everyone
items.summary: Become an AI power user in this new course taught by Andrew Ng. From finding information to building apps, you'll develop the prompting skills that get real, useful results from today's most powerful AI models.

items.title: Smol Course
items.summary: Hugging Face Learn 免费开源课程 · smol-course

items.title: LLM Course
items.summary: Hugging Face Learn 免费开源课程 · llm-course

items.title: Gemini CLI: Code & Create with an Open-Source Agent
items.summary: Build real-world applications from the command line using Gemini CLI, Google's open-source agentic coding assistant that coordinates local tools and cloud services to automate coding and creative workflows.

items.title: Agent Skills with Anthropic
items.summary: Equip agents with expert on-demand knowledge to enable reliable coding, research, and data analysis workflows

items.title: A2A: The Agent2Agent Protocol
items.summary: Connect agents across different frameworks and teams using A2A, the open protocol standardizing agent-to-agent communication.

items.title: Agent Memory: Building Memory-Aware Agents
items.summary: Build a complete agent memory system that lets an LLM store, retrieve, and refine knowledge across sessions—turning a stateless agent into one that learns and improves over time.

items.title: Spec-Driven Development with Coding Agents
items.summary: Move beyond vibe coding: write clear specs that give your coding agent the context it needs to build intentional, maintainable software.

items.title: Build Interactive Agents with Generative UI
items.summary: Build fullstack agent apps that go beyond plain text, generating custom UIs like charts, forms, and whiteboards on demand.

items.title: AI Agents for Image and Video Generation
items.summary: Build AI agents that generate images and videos, evaluate output automatically, and iterate until results meet your quality standards

items.title: Voice for AI Agents and Applications
items.summary: Add voice to your AI agents and applications using three integration patterns: embedded voice, voice layered on existing agents, and voice as a callable tool.

items.title: AI Agents Course
items.summary: Hugging Face Learn 免费开源课程 · agents-course

items.title: Efficient Inference with SGLang: Text and Image Generation
items.summary: Learn how LLM inference works under the hood and implement caching optimizations, including KV cache and RadixAttention, to make text and image generation faster and cheaper.

items.title: Transformers in Practice
items.summary: Go beyond just using LLMs to actually understanding them. In this course taught by Sharon Zhou, you'll build the intuition to reason about model behavior, debug real problems, and make smarter decisions about deploying transformer-based models.

items.title: Fast & Efficient LLM Inference with vLLM
items.summary: Optimize, deploy, and benchmark an open-source LLM with vLLM.

items.title: Fast LLM Inference with Cerebras
items.summary: This course, built in partnership with Cerebras and taught by Zhenwei Gao, Sebastian Duerr, and Sarah Chieng of Cerebras, shows you how to build LLM applications that respond in real time on Cerebras' Wafer-Scale Engine (WSE-3). It's a chip large enough to hold a model's weights
